label: Product Profile
definition: A detailed evaluation of a specific vendor's product, including features, competitive positioning, and buying recommendations

label: Relational Database Management
definition: Market domain covering relational database management systems (RDBMS) and related data management technologies

label: Industry Analysis
definition: Qualitative and quantitative evaluation of an industry sector's competitive dynamics and trends

label: Competitive Profiling
definition: Systematic comparison of a product's features and positioning against competitors

label: Benchmarking
definition: Evaluation using standardized performance tests (e.g., TPC-C) to compare products

label: Product Description
definition: Factual description of a product's features or capabilities

label: Market Assessment
definition: Analyst evaluation of a product's or company's competitive standing in the market

label: Competitive Assessment
definition: Direct comparison of a product to competing offerings

label: Buying Recommendation
definition: Advice to IS buyers on when or why to consider a product

label: Editorial Opinion
definition: Analyst opinion or interpretive statement not directly sourced from vendor

label: Benchmark Result
definition: Quantitative performance measurement result

label: Product Roadmap
definition: Description of announced or upcoming product features

label: Market Data
definition: Quantitative market statistic (installed base, revenue, etc.)

label: Revenue Data
definition: Company financial revenue figure

label: Profit Data
definition: Company financial profit figure

label: Risk Assessment
definition: Analyst evaluation of risks or challenges facing a company or product

label: Feature Description
definition: Description of a specific technical feature or capability

label: Standards Compliance
definition: Description of compliance with industry or de facto standards

label: Platform Support
definition: Description of supported operating systems, hardware platforms, or environments

label: Protocol Support
definition: Description of supported networking or communication protocols

label: Gateway/Interoperability
definition: Description of connectivity to external or competing systems

label: Vendor Statement
definition: Direct quote or paraphrase of a vendor's stated strategy or goal

label: Market Expansion
definition: Description of a vendor's strategy to expand into new market segments

label: Market Trend
definition: Observation about broader trends in the market

label: Heritage/Maturity
definition: Reference to a product's historical pedigree or years of experience

label: Sales Channel
definition: Description of how a product is sold or distributed

label: Ecosystem/Partnership
definition: Description of partner products or ecosystem integrations

label: DORS Evaluation Criteria
definition: Aberdeen's criteria framework for evaluating distributed open RDBMS products

label: Benchmark Price-Performance
definition: Price-performance metric from a standardized benchmark

label: TP Monitor Support
definition: Description of supported transaction processing monitors

label: High Availability
definition: Description of fault tolerance and failover capabilities

label: Positive
definition: Observation conveys a favorable or strong result

label: Negative
definition: Observation conveys an unfavorable or weak result

label: Neutral
definition: Observation is factual with no evaluative tone

label: High Confidence
definition: Claim is directly stated in the source document

label: Medium Confidence
definition: Claim requires modest interpretation of source material

label: Low Confidence
definition: Claim is inferred from limited or indirect evidence

label: Company
definition: A commercial organization

label: Subject
definition: The primary product or company being profiled

label: Competitor
definition: A competing company mentioned in a competitive context

label: Ecosystem Partner
definition: A company providing complementary products or services

label: Research Author
definition: The organization that produced the study

label: Active
definition: Company or product remains independently operational as of review date

label: Acquired
definition: Company was acquired by another entity

label: Rebranded
definition: Company changed its name or was absorbed under a different brand

label: Unknown
definition: Current status could not be determined

label: Active
definition: Technology remains in current, widespread use

label: Legacy
definition: Technology still in use in some environments but largely superseded

label: Obsolete
definition: Technology has been discontinued and is no longer in use

label: Strategy Classification
definition: Categorization of an entity's business strategy or competitive positioning

label: Viability Prediction
definition: Expert prediction of entity's long-term survival or market trajectory

label: Actual Outcome
definition: Verified historical outcome for an entity or prediction

label: Technology Assessment
definition: Evaluation of a technology's maturity, fitness, or competitive positioning

label: Benchmark Result
definition: Quantitative performance comparison against peers or industry standards

label: Framework Factor
definition: One component of a multi-factor analytical framework

label: Market Data
definition: Quantitative market statistic such as revenue, share, or growth rate

label: Expert Opinion
definition: Qualitative professional judgment or analytical finding

label: Document Review
definition: Analysis of existing documents, reports, and published records

label: Field Research
definition: Primary data collection via IS executive interviews or customer surveys

label: Revenue Benchmarking
definition: Measurement and comparison of entity revenues against market total

label: Verified
definition: Confirmed by subsequent events, independent sources, or official records
